_comment: Reference large-battle scenario for tools/benchmark (see tools/benchmark/README.md). Two 8-unit armies (~860 soldiers/side, ~1720 total) deployed nose-to-nose so melee/ranged combat starts on tick 0 -- no scripted orders needed. This is meant to represent the biggest battle the game should support, not a toy case. Loaded directly by BenchmarkRunner.gd via Battle.scenario (the same mechanism demos/inputs/*.json 'scenario' staging uses; see demos/README.md), NOT via DemoInputRecorder, so there is no 'steps'/'camera' input track here.
